title: Constitutional validity of Punjab’s new sacrilege law
description: The Punjab State Assembly recently enacted the Jaagat Jot Sri Guru Granth Sahib Satkar (Amendment) Act, 2026, which has been notified in the Official Gazette. The Amendment Act introduces a statutory definition of "sacrilege" and prescribes enhanced punishment for the offence, providing for imprisonment of either description for a term which shall not be less than 7 years but which may extend to 20 years, and a fine which shall not be less than 2 lakh rupees but which may extend to 10 lakh rupee
